common.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the service. Check your connection.
common.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Welcome to PepiProgress
home.body: Track how peptides actually affect you, and see real progress over time.

explore.title: Explore
explore.body: Your tracking, insights, and progress will live here.

goals.title: What are your goals?
goals.subtitle: Pick any that apply, they shape what you log.
goals.required: Pick at least one to continue

compounds.title: What are you taking?
compounds.subtitle: Select your compounds. This tailors your daily check-in.
compounds.note: Dose, route and frequency come next, coming soon.

cycle.title: Track your cycle?
cycle.subtitle: Optional. Flags normal water-retention weeks so you don't mistake them for lack of progress. You can change this anytime.

weight.title: Your starting weight
weight.subtitle: Optional. Sets your baseline for trend tracking.

health.title: Connect health data
health.subtitle: Auto-fill weight, sleep, and activity from your health tracker.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.subtitle: How are you today?
checkin.donePhotoPrompt: Keep your timeline honest with a consistent photo.

quicklog.title: Quick log
quicklog.label: In your words
quicklog.notConfigured: Quick-log AI isn't set up yet.
quicklog.voiceHint: Tip: tap the mic on your keyboard to speak instead of type.
quicklog.macroSeed: How much protein and calories did you have today?
quicklog.backgroundHint: Log it and go. We’ll distill it in the background.

photos.title: Progress photos
photos.permission: Camera access lets you take consistent progress photos, stored privately, just for you.
photos.ghostHint: Line yourself up with the faint guide.
photos.empty: No photos yet. Capture your first to start your timeline.
photos.clothingGuidance: For the most accurate results, wear as little as you're comfortable with. Underwear or nothing gives the algorithm a direct view of body composition changes.
photos.clothingHint: Less fabric = more accurate. Underwear or swimwear recommended.
photos.importLibrary: Import a photo from your library
photos.baselineSet: Baseline captured. First check-in scheduled for {{date}}.
photos.heading: Photos
photos.timelinePlaceholder: Your timeline builds as you capture
photos.analysisPlaceholder: AI analysis appears after your next comparison
photos.fitPoor: Very different from baseline. Consider retaking.
photos.qualityLowBody: Your score is lower than recommended. We recommend using less tight or baggy clothing for a better read. Remember, we don't use your photos to train our algorithm.
photos.bodyFatNeed: Add waist + neck for a body-fat estimate

symptoms.title: Symptoms & side effects
symptoms.photoSuggestion: This symptom may show visually. Scroll up to capture a progress photo.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.empty: No compounds yet. Add what you're taking below.
protocol.addFirstPrompt: Add your first compound to start tracking doses and inventory.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.empty: No items yet. Add a vial or consumable below.
inventory.label: Name

recon.title: Reconstitution calculator
recon.draw: Draw {{volume}} mL ({{units}} units on a U-100 syringe)
recon.enterValues: Enter vial, water and dose to calculate.

ageGate.label: AGE VERIFICATION
ageGate.title: Date of birth
ageGate.subtitle: You must be 18 or older to use PepiProgress.
ageGate.errorAge: You must be 18 or older to use this app.
ageGate.whyWeAsk: We require age verification to comply with app store and legal requirements. Your date of birth is stored only on your device.

storage.label: 1 OF 2, PHOTO STORAGE
storage.title: Store your progress photos
storage.body: Progress photos need to be stored so the ghost overlay and timeline can work. They are private by default, never shared unless you choose to.
storage.notice: Stored privately on your device and (when you create an account) in an encrypted private bucket, never shown to others, never used to train AI models.
storage.bullet1: Photos stay on your device by default.
storage.bullet3: Never used to train any AI model. Ever.

ai.label: 2 OF 2, AI ANALYSIS
ai.title: AI photo analysis
ai.body: Our AI compares consecutive photos for lighting, angle, and framing consistency, and gives a hedged, observational change note. It never diagnoses anything.
ai.notice: Photos are sent to a server-side AI service for analysis. Your photos are never used to train any model. Analysis is observational only, never a medical claim.

privacy.title: PRIVACY & DATA
privacy.exportBody: Download a copy of all your data as JSON, check-ins, doses, symptoms, protocols, and photo metadata.
privacy.deleteBody: Permanently delete all your local data. This cannot be undone. When you have an account, cloud data is also erased.
privacy.notMedicalAdvice: PepiProgress is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making decisions about your health.

report.title: PepiProgress Report
report.body: Export a PDF summary to share with a coach or doctor.
report.disclaimer: Self-reported data, not a medical record.

integrations.description: Connect a health source to auto-fill your log.
integrations.empty: No data sources available on this device yet.
integrations.importSubtitle: Bring in past data to start with a richer baseline.

notify.description: Local reminders on this device. No account needed.
notify.webUnsupported: Reminders are available on the mobile app.
notify.checkinBody: Take a moment to log how today went.
notify.doseBody: Don't forget to log today's doses.
notify.inventoryBody_one: {{count}} item is low or expiring soon.
notify.inventoryBody_other: {{count}} items are low or expiring soon.
notify.photoBody: A new progress comparison is ready to capture.
notify.macroBody: How much protein and calories did you have today?

cycle.description: Optional. Flags luteal-phase water retention on weight, measurements, and photos so the algorithm accounts for it.

measurements.optionalHint: Optional: log measurements to track body composition changes.

bodyType.description: Optional. Helps the algorithm set the right baseline expectations for your body type.

auth.signUpSubtitle: Create a free account to back up your data and sync across devices.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to restore your data on this device.
auth.migratedBody: Your data has been saved to the cloud.
auth.restoredBody: Your data has been loaded onto this device.
auth.partialSync: {{count}} item(s) could not sync, your local data is safe.
auth.errorMissingFields: Please enter your email and password.

account.noAccountBody: Your data lives on this device only. Create a free account to back it up and access it anywhere.

lab.description: Import bloodwork results from a photo of your lab report.
lab.empty: Nothing recognized. Try a clearer, well-lit photo.
lab.permissionNeeded: Camera or photo library access is needed to import a lab result.
lab.vialUnreadable: Label is unclear. Try a closer, well-lit photo.
lab.pdfSaved: Saved {{name}}. PDF parsing is coming soon.

drive.description: Back up your data to your personal Google Drive. Private app storage, not visible in your Drive folder.
drive.restoreBody: Restore from backup made on {{date}}? Your current data will be merged.
drive.noBackups: No backups found in Google Drive.
drive.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
drive.notConfigured: Google credentials are not configured (EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID missing).
drive.webUnsupported: Drive backup is available on the mobile app.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: AI analysis grounded in your own logged data. Never medical or dosing advice.
insights.askPlaceholder: e.g. how has my sleep trended since I started?
insights.notConfigured: AI insights aren't set up yet.
insights.error: Couldn't analyze right now. Try again.
insights.insufficient: Not enough logged data yet to find a pattern. Keep logging.
insights.disclaimer: Observational analysis of your own data, not medical advice.
insights.heading: Your data
insights.unlockBody: Insights find patterns across your logs: trends, correlations, and answers about your own data.

compounds.noResults: No matches. Add it as a custom compound below.

dashboard.empty: Log a few days or add a photo to see your progress here.
dashboard.estimatedHint: Dashed line: estimated from your wearable data.
dashboard.estimatedModeHint: Estimates come from your heart rate, HRV, sleep and activity. They never replace what you log.
dashboard.dosesPlaceholder: Add a protocol to track daily doses
dashboard.distillError: Couldn’t reach the service. We’ll retry automatically.

addCompound.title: Add compound
addCompound.reconSuggestion: Add {{water}} mL BAC water for {{conc}} mg/mL
addCompound.logVial: I have this vial on hand
addCompound.reconHint: Enter a dose and vial size for a reconstitution suggestion.

ask.title: ASK PEPI
ask.notUnderstood: Not sure how to answer that yet. Try a suggestion.

verdict.baselineCta: Take your first photo to start your baseline

explanation.building: Still building your baseline. Keep logging and a reading will appear.
explanation.on_track: Your {{metric}} is moving the way your goal needs.
explanation.watch: Signals are mixed. A few more days will settle it.
explanation.off_track: Your {{metric}} is drifting from your goal.
explanation.plateau: Your weight is holding. Tape and photos carry the read now.

reconcile.trainingLoad: Your {{metric}} reflects recent training load, not a setback.
reconcile.cycle: Your {{metric}} tracks your cycle, not fat regain.
reconcile.compound: Your {{metric}} is an expected effect of your protocol.

pepi.subtitle: Log anything, or ask about your data.
